evidence: Fresh PoC linked against builds/protobuf-asan-arm64/ and exercised the real compiled tokenizer surface in libprotobuf.a without any ASan/UBSan finding (exit code 0; see bugs/protobuf/protobuf-input-002/poc/asan_output.txt). The originally analyzed path depends on upb tokenizer/string entry points, but nm on builds/protobuf-asan-arm64/lib/libupb.a found no exported matches for upb_Tokenizer_New, upb_Parse_String, upb_String_Append, or upb_String_Reserve (see bugs/protobuf/protobuf-input-002/validation/libupb_symbol_probe.txt, empty output).
